subject: ARLO SEO — Weekly Pulse — 2026-07-17
html:
Week 5 Pulse

Shipped since last pulse: /compare/whatagraph-vs-arlo (2026-07-13) and /connect/youtube-mcp (2026-07-16) — the connector matrix now covers all four live/ga Google-source connectors (GA4, Google Ads, Search Console, YouTube); only Meta Ads remains blocked on a human confirming launch status. Below is where the numbers stand — several rows are still pending because the automated GSC/GA4 data pulls aren't wired into this sandbox yet.

Leads proxy (GA4 conversions)

Pending — GA4 (G-CP22NBPLFP) is firing, but this sandbox has no outbound GA4 API access. Still waiting on the scheduled data Action (12-week-strategy.md Week 8) to backfill this row.

Ranking movement

KeywordLast wkNowTrend
No data — see \"Anything broken?\" below

Traffic vs last week

Pending — same root cause as rankings: no SE Ranking tracking project for askarlo.app, and no reachable GSC/GA4 from this sandbox. Re-checked SE Ranking's own organic index live this session (getDomainKeywords, getDomainOverviewByCountry, US) — still zero organic keywords and zero AI-search visibility (getAiSearchOverview: brand_presence null, link_presence 0) for askarlo.app. Expected for a domain this new, but it also means we still have no instrument reading at all.

Anything broken?

No build/pipeline regressions. SEO Report Email Action: 7 of 8 runs green since 2026-07-04 (the one failure was the very first shakeout run on 2026-07-04, before the pipeline was working end-to-end); every run since, including this week's YouTube MCP page push, sent and archived cleanly. Each shipping session's own build gate (npm run build + npm run lint) came back clean per the worklog.

Still open: the SE Ranking rank-tracking gap flagged last pulse (2026-07-10) has not been closed. Re-confirmed this session — still no SE Ranking project for askarlo.app (33 other sites tracked on the account, none of them Arlo). Two more content sessions have shipped since that flag (Whatagraph compare, YouTube MCP) with zero rank visibility into any of it. This routine can't create the tracking project itself (recurring paid keyword-tracking commitment, a setup decision not a reporting one) — needs a human or a dedicated session to: create an SE Ranking project for askarlo.app, add the P1 keyword list from audits/keyword-research.md, Google US + CA search engines, weekly checks.

Reading the week

Content velocity stayed on pace — connector matrix is now essentially done (4/5 live sources) and comparison hub has 4 pages. Meanwhile the P1 target keywords are heating up in SE Ranking's own demand index: \"google ads mcp\" monthly search volume climbed 390\u2192590 in the last month, \"claude mcp server\" 735\u2192810, \"google analytics mcp\" 320\u2192390 \u2014 the wedge this whole strategy is betting on is growing fast. But two pulses running now, we still have no instrument telling us whether any shipped page has entered that demand curve. Recommend the next session prioritize standing up SE Ranking tracking over new pages \u2014 the connector-matrix build-out is far enough ahead of the measurement layer that further content risks compounding the blind spot rather than closing it.
